_meta.description: Example assembled 7-section Loremaster context packet. Represents the packet that would have been sent after the autodoc scene (Session 1, second move: Face Danger +Wits, Weak Hit). Used by assembler.test.js and integration tests.

section1_safety.label: Safety Configuration
section1_safety.note: Always first — no creative content precedes this.
lines: No situations that endanger children. Children may not appear as characters in peril under any circumstances.
veils: Children as plot-significant characters. Children may exist in the setting but may not drive or feature prominently in storylines.

section2_worldTruths.label: World Truths
section2_worldTruths.note: Relevant truths only — full list in campaign flags. Selected by assembler based on active threads.

activeTruths.text: The Ascendancy left vaults untethered from reality. Their vaults persist: structures that exist simultaneously in the Forge and somewhere else. Entering one is to step partly out of reality.
AI is outlawed — the Adepts fill the void. All artificial intelligence was banned by Covenant law. Adepts — humans trained from childhood — serve as navigators, analysts, and administrators.
The knowledge is gone. Advanced medical science was lost in the Exodus. Healers work with incomplete tools and incomplete understanding.
Iron is the word, the bond, the sacred vow. The iron of the exodus ships — salvaged and reshaped — is the most precious material in the Forge.

move.rationale: Player narrated two intertwined actions: getting the survivor to the med bay and dealing with unreliable equipment. The autodoc complication is the real obstacle — Face Danger +Wits. The autodoc is the danger standing between the survivor and stability.

section4_consequences.label: Consequences
section4_consequences.note: Derived from CONSEQUENCE_MAP[FaceDanger][WeakHit]. Passed to Loremaster for narrative realisation.
mechanicalConsequences: Success with a cost — the obstacle is overcome but something is lost, damaged, or complicated.
section4_consequences.suggestedNarrativeDirection: The autodoc stabilizes the survivor, but the cost introduces a complication. The complication should be: (a) medically interesting — the autodoc flagged something it cannot treat; (b) narratively forward-leaning — the new information should deepen one of the two active threads (NPC condition or artifact identity); (c) not a retraction of the success — she is stable.

connections.name: Unknown Courier
connections.notes: Deliberate courier of iron relic. Radiation signature: Ascendancy vault. Has not released the panel under sedation. Name not yet established.

ships.name: Player Ship
ships.notes: Med bay at capacity. Sable integrated via Weave dataweave.

artifacts.name: Iron Navigational Panel
artifacts.location: In courier's possession — arm, not released
artifacts.notes: Ascendancy script beneath standard markings. Radiation signature confirmed. Purpose unknown.

section6_campaignState.label: Campaign State

activeVows.label: Personal vow — unstated during session
activeVows.note: Player noted motivation as personal vow during initial intercept narration. Details not surfaced.

openThreads: NPC condition — courier stabilized, prognosis uncertain
Artifact identity — iron navigational panel, Ascendancy script, radiation signature
Sable's legal status under Covenant AI law

recentMoves.summary: Debris field intercept — plotted course through dense field to unknown contact.
Autodoc reboot — stabilized courier, cost pending Loremaster narration.

section7_loremasterInstruction.label: Loremaster Instruction
section7_loremasterInstruction.note: Final section. Contains the direct narration prompt.
section7_loremasterInstruction.instruction: Continue the scene. The autodoc has stabilized the courier. Narrate the cost of the Weak Hit — something is revealed, complicated, or introduced that deepens the situation without undoing the success. The player's next action is unscripted. End at a beat that invites a response rather than resolving the thread.
section7_loremasterInstruction.tone: Gritty realist science fiction. Sparse prose. No florid description. Specific sensory detail over general atmosphere. The autodoc is barely adequate — convey this without stating it directly.
constraints: Do not name the courier — she is not yet named in the fiction.
Do not resolve the artifact mystery — deepen it.
Do not move Sable physically — she speaks from the doorway, she is in the dataweave.
Safety: Global Lines and Veils apply. No children in peril.

tokenBudget.note: Token estimates are approximate. Assembler enforces a hard ceiling; sections are truncated in reverse order (7→1) if budget is exceeded, with section1_safety never truncated.
